title: Chinnanchiru Idhayathil Lyrics Narthagi song lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Vijay Prakash, Prashanthini
Song: Chinnanchiru Idhayathil
Music : GV Prakash

[Chinnanchiru idhayathile mazhai thuli kudhikiradhe
Enna indha sondham endru, etti etti parkiradhe
Mazhai thuli vizhuvadhu mannuku theriyum
Manithuli serum-idam yaarukku theriyum

Idhu nadhiyaga odi, kadaloadu koodi
Muthaagumaa illai uppaaguma ] (2)

Kizhaigalil poo poothal ooruku therindhu vidum
Verilum poo pookum adhuthaan pen idhayam
Pen manadhin kadhal ellam, kairegai pole
Valara valra kooda valarum yeno konjam mele

Idhu kannai pinbam, adhai kaitheendum vayadhu
Dhinam anbaagi anbaagi alaipaayum manadu

Chinnanchiru idhayathile, mazhai thuli kudhikiradhe
Enna indha sondham endru, etti etti parkiradhe

Ovvaru vayadhinilum ovvaru kanav-irukum
Vazhve kanavu mayam enbadhaye maradhirukum
Thaozhamayin kai pidithu, nadandhu sellum podhu
Kadhal ennum ooruku adhu kooti sellum paaru

Silar theriyamal povaar, silar thrindhe thaan povaar
Ini edhirkalam ennaagum yaar solla koodum

Chinnanchiru idhayathile mazhai thuli kudhikiradhe
Enna indha sondham endru, etti etti parkiradhe
Mazhai thuli vizhuvadhu mannuku theriyum
Manithuli serum-idam yaarukku theriyum
Idhu nadhiyaga odi, kadaloadu koodi
Muthaagumaa illai uppaaguma

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Chinnanchiru Idhayathil explores themes of love and emotional connection, portraying the beauty of relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Narthagi, the song is set during a romantic moment, highlighting the bond between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Prashanthini and Vijay Prakash, with music composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

Chinnanchiru Idhayathil was released on February 19, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinnanchiru Idhayathil, the song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and longing, set against the backdrop of the film Narthagi. The soothing melody, brought to life by the harmonious voices of Prashanthini and Vijay Prakash, evokes a sense of warmth and tenderness. As the characters navigate their feelings, the lyrics reflect the deep connections that bind them. This romantic duet is perfect for moments of celebration and intimacy, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinnanchiru Idhayathil from Narthagi is a beautifully crafted romantic duet that captures the essence of love and connection. With the enchanting voices of Prashanthini and Vijay Prakash, paired with GV PrakashKumar's melodious composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into this soothing melody that perfectly encapsulates heartfelt emotions and tender moments.
stanzaMeanings: In this small heart, raindrops are falling. What is this bond, I keep looking at it closely. The raindrops falling will be known to the earth. Who knows where the human heart will unite?
Is this flowing like a river, or is it just salty?
When flowers bloom on the ground, they will spread to the town. The flower will bloom in the heart of a girl. The love in the heart, like a vine, will grow and grow a little higher.
This is a sweet pain, which I hold on to. Every day, my mind is filled with love.
In this small heart, raindrops are falling. What is this bond, I keep looking at it closely.
In every age, everyone has their dreams. Life's dream is said to be an illusion. When we hold hands in unity and move forward, see how love unites the town.
Some will leave without knowing, some will leave after understanding. Who can say what the future will be?

In this small heart, raindrops are falling. What is this bond, I keep looking at it closely. The raindrops falling will be known to the earth. Who knows where the human heart will unite? Is this flowing like a river, or is it just salty?
